name: teeterLoop
purpose: Endless teetering around a bottom pivot — continuous tipping as if on a base (transform-origin bottom).
template:
{{css target}} { transform-origin: bottom center; animation: motion-teeterLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-teeterLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: rotate(-{{css params.angle}}deg) } to { transform: rotate({{css params.angle}}deg) } }
